title: Maa Kalaratri Mantra
intro: Read the Maa Kalaratri Mantra with meaning. Chant this mantra with devotion to receive the grace of Mother Kalaratri.
description:
Main Mantra

Om Devi Kalaratryai Namah.

English Meaning

Om,
I bow to
Goddess Kalaratri.

faq.q1: When should Maa Kalaratri Mantra be chanted?
faq.a1: Maa Kalaratri Mantra is considered auspicious when chanted in the morning or on the seventh day of Navratri.
faq.q2: How many times should Maa Kalaratri Mantra be chanted?
faq.a2: It is commonly chanted 11, 21, 51, or 108 times.
faq.q3: What are the benefits of chanting Maa Kalaratri Mantra?
faq.a3: According to Hindu tradition, chanting this mantra is believed to remove fear, increase courage, bring positive energy, and invoke the blessings of Maa Kalaratri.
faq.q4: Can Maa Kalaratri Mantra be chanted daily?
faq.a4: Yes, Maa Kalaratri Mantra can be chanted every day with devotion.
faq.q5: Can anyone chant Maa Kalaratri Mantra?
faq.a5: Yes, anyone may chant Maa Kalaratri Mantra with faith and devotion.
